LanguageData.RICS.CC.weather.usage: Usage: !weather [type]. Available types: rain, snow, fog, thunderstorm, clear, etc.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.Buy.Usage: Usage: !buy {item} [quality] [material] [quantity], only used for items. Also !use !equip !wear
LanguageData.RICS.CC.purchaselist.message: Check out the item prices and purchase list here: {0}
LanguageData.RICS.CC.pricecheck.notfound: ❌ Item '{0}' not found in the store.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.pricecheck.errorthingdef: ❌ Could not find item definition for '{0}'
LanguageData.RICS.CC.raid.unkownarg: Unknown argument: {0}. Use !raidinfo for available options.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.raid.invalidraidtype: Raid type '{0}' is not allowed. Available types: {1}
LanguageData.RICS.CC.raid.invalidstratagy: Strategy '{0}' is not allowed. Available strategies: {1}
LanguageData.RICS.CC.common.interaction.dlc_required: This command requires the Ideology DLC.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.common.PurchaseLimit: Store purchase limit reached ({0} per {1} days)
LanguageData.RICS.CC.togglestore.invalid_and_usage: Invalid argument.\nUsage: !togglestore [on/off] or just !togglestore to toggle\nCurrent store status: {0}
LanguageData.RICS.CC.pawn.handlist.usage: List types: races, xenotypes [race]. Examples: !pawn list races, !pawn list xenotypes human
LanguageData.RICS.CC.mypawn.usage: !mypawn [type]: body, health, implants, gear, kills, needs, relations, skills, stats, story, traits, work
LanguageData.RICS.CC.leave.nopawn: You don't have a pawn assigned to release.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.leave.successs: ✅ You have released {0}{1}. You can now get a new pawn with !pawn command.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.leave.deadpawnletter: {0} has released their connection to the deceased {1}. Their story in the colony has come to a close.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.leave.pawnletter: {0} has decided to part ways with {1}. The colonist, feeling the severed bond, has chosen to leave the settlement behind.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.setfavoritecolor.nodlc: The !setfavoritecolor command requires the Ideology DLC to be enabled.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.bal.notfound: Could not find your viewer data.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.bal.notActive: Not currently active (chat to become active!)
LanguageData.RICS.CC.whatiskarma: Karma affects your coin rewards! Higher karma = more coins per 2 min cycle. Be active and positive to increase karma.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.lookup.usage: Usage: !lookup [item|event|weather|trait|race|xenotype] [name] Examples: !lookup item rifle, !lookup race (lists races), !lookup event raid
LanguageData.RICS.CC.giftcoins.invalidAmount: Please specify a valid positive number of coins.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.giftcoins.selfGift: You cannot give coins to yourself.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.giftcoins.notEnough: You don't have enough coins. You have {0} but tried to give {1}.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.giftcoins.targetBanned: Cannot give coins to banned viewer '{0}'.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.giftcoins.success: Gave {0} coins to {1}. You now have {2} remaining.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.giftcoins.error: An error occurred during the transaction. Please try again.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.colonists.basic: There are {0} colonists and {1} colony animals.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.colonists.withViewers: There are {0} colonists ({1} controlled by viewers) and {2} colony animals.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.storage.usage: Usage: !storage [item name] (examples: !storage steel, !storage plasteel longsword, !storage hyperweave)
LanguageData.RICS.CC.storage.noMatch: No items matching '{0}' found in storage.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.storage.noItemsAtAll: No items found in any storage/stockpile on this map.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.storage.defsButZero: Found matching definitions for '{0}', but none in storage right now.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.givecoins.errorcoin: Please specify a valid positive number of coins.
LanguageData.RICS.CC.givecoins.success: Gave {0:N0} coins to {1}. {1} now has {2:N0} coins.
